rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 16, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is continued to April 9, 2021. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: NAIM JAMALI VS. JORGE ISABEL VILLATA ORDONEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 16, 2021 line 10. DEFENDANT KATHERINE ORDONEZ REYES, JORGE ORDONEZ VILLATA, JOSE GUZMAN SINTA, ALBA REYES SANDOVAL DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to make proper allegations in forms UD-100 and UD-101 regarding service of Notice to repair or quit. No such allegations currently appear in the body of the body of said forms. The Court does not reach the issues raises regarding Notice to pay or Quit at this time.
